nodes.name: Willcocks's honeyguide
nodes.summary: Willcocks's honeyguide（Indicator willcocksi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Willcocks's honeyguide。

nodes.name: Indicator
nodes.summary: Indicator（Indicator）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Dwarf honeyguide、Willcocks's honeyguide、Pallid honeyguide等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Willcocks's honeyguide
nodes.summary: Willcocks's honeyguide (Indicator willcocksi) is a species of bird in the family Indicatoridae. It is found mainly throughout the African tropical rainforest. The common name and Latin binomial commemorate the General Sir James Willcocks. References
